headline: ServiceNow AI Partnerships Test Mission Critical Role In Regulated Workflows
summary: In March 2026, ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) expanded its AI platform through new partnerships with Aiva Health, Cohesity, and Prismforce. The company is rolling out voice driven bedside AI with Aiva Health for frontline healthcare workflows. A collaboration with Cohesity focuses on resilient autonomous AI agents for data rich, regulated environments. Prismforce integrations target domain based workforce intelligence and planning for service heavy organizations. Together, these moves aim to position...

headline: LivePerson Announces Event-driven Orchestration Partnership with Coral Active
summary: LivePerson (NASDAQ: LPSN), a leading provider of predictable conversational AI, today announced the launch of LivePerson Sync in partnership with Coral Active, a leader in enterprise contact center integrations. LivePerson Sync enables seamless integration with systems like Salesforce, Microsoft, and ServiceNow, bringing CRM data and workflows directly into the live agent workspace.
